# SEO Destroyer Pro

> A parody SEO tool that "destroys" your website's SEO with absurd anti-recommendations.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Web Audio API, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — Main application component with destruction logic
- src/sounds.ts — Web Audio API sound effects
- src/index.css — Tailwind and global styles

## Features
- Destruction slider (mild to nuclear)
- Certificate generator (html2canvas)
- Confetti celebration (canvas-confetti)
- Sound effects (Web Audio API)
- Shareable share cards
- Easter eggs and toast notifications

## URLs
- Live: https://seo-destroyer-pro.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/seo-destroyer-pro
